title: Phone Column Masking Field: Extensions
excerpt:
It would be helpful to also support phone’s masking edit field for extension. 
E.g. +1 (617) 123-4567 x999

posts.author: matlabninja (Matlab Ninja)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be helpful to also support phone’s masking edit field for extension.

E.g. +1 (617) 123-4567 x999

posts.author: Charlie00TJ (Charlie Nowak)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just tried the phone column today. I was very excited…then let down.

Not only does it not recognize extensions, it has a problem recognizing different phone number formats.

1112223333
111.222.3333
(111) 222-3333
111-222-3333
111-222-3333;1234
111-222-3333x1234
111-222-3333ext.1234

Good luck getting any type of consistent phone number to show up.

Is there a way to use a formula to parse this information? It not hard to leverage additional separators.

posts.author: CindyWearsRed (Cindy Lo)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone responded to this because we just noticed today that the phone number field doesn’t take extensions and trying to avoid creating another column if possible.

posts.author: Charlie00TJ (Charlie Nowak)
posts.cookedHtml: no response. I have another field for the extension, but we aren’t using it. It would be great to have it work for mobile users.

posts.author: RealDogDad (Brandan Foster)
posts.cookedHtml:
I found a workaround.
Make a Link Column.
in the address section tel:+16171234567;999 in the display section +1 (617) 123-4567 x999
This enables click-to-call if used on Chrome based browsers or Android App (not tested on iOS).

posts.author: Topio (Javier Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Love the workaround and it works,
I hate that is two pieces of information formatted differently
the phone column however could be vastly improved

  1. Handle Different Formats
    2 Handle Extensions
    3 Default the area code or country code for local operations

posts.author: matthewamsign (Matthew B)
posts.cookedHtml: This is something I am running into as well. I would rather not change our entire structure to fit the workaround as it would create too much work. Adding my comment to hopefully bring more attention to this thread!

posts.author: LaShaye (LaShaye Floyd)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding my vote here as well. Just ran into this today with a 5 digit extension. The board was adding up all of my extension numbers and I couldn’t figure out why I was seeing totals that I had not planned for - lol!

posts.author: LaShaye (LaShaye Floyd)
posts.cookedHtml: I wanted to check and see if there was any update on this. I was working on a table today and noticed that this basic feature was still not available.
